assignments.description: Assign values to be set on the recurring donation
assignments.name: Assign_custom_RD_fields
assignments.label: Assign custom RD fields

assignments.description: Gift Tributes is a feature to allow donors to donate in honor of / in memory of someone else.
assignments.name: Enable_Gift_Tributes
assignments.label: Enable Gift Tributes

formulas.description: The final amount taking into account the cover fees checkbox
formulas.name: FinalAmountOneTime

formulas.description: The final amount taking into account the cover fees checkbox
formulas.name: FinalAmountRecurring

formulas.description: False by default. If your form supports payers from overseas change this formula to determine overseas or not based on the payers address information.
formulas.name: GiftAidOverseas

value.stringValue: Dedicate your gift to a special person

fields.name: GiftTributeNotify
fields.fieldText: Would you like to inform someone of your donation?

value.stringValue: Email address of tribute message recipient

fields.name: GiftAid
fields.fieldText: Yes, I want to Gift Aid any donations now, in the future and in the past four years

fields.name: DebugDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
{!Pay_Button.result.statusCode}: {!Pay_Button.result.errorMessage}


For more information on failing payments see the Logs object in this org.
